title: NSDI 2027
content: One paper submitted to NSDI 2027 and one to IMC 2026!

title: PaddlePaddle Open Source Star of the Year
content: 🎉Selected as PaddlePaddle Open Source Star of the Year 2025 (Awarded in Beijing, only 10 recipients annually)!

title: Admitted to Peking University
content: 🚀Admitted to Peking University through the postgraduate recommendation program!
